project.title: A Mediocre Engineer With AI Beats a Genius Without It
project.style_notes: premium cinematic tech explainer, dark graphite environments, cool white and electric amber highlights, sleek motion-graphics energy, subtle particles, clean silhouettes, high contrast without readable UI text, visually expensive and modern
project.format_guidance: Compose for premium 9:16 vertical framing. Keep the main subject dominant in the center third, preserve the lower-center safe area for subtitles, and avoid critical detail at the very top and bottom edges.
project.narration_style: urgent, sharp, broad-audience English explainer with confident pacing
project.narration_notes: Every line must be understandable on first listen. Favor strong, provocative phrasing over jargon, but keep the claims defensible.
project.consistency_notes: Do not depict recognizable real people or logos. Use generic engineers, abstract AI agents, holographic swarms, symbolic dashboards without readable text, and visual metaphors for leverage, speed, and competition.
constraints: no readable on-screen text inside generated visuals
no logos, no brand marks, no watermark
avoid uncanny or photoreal close human faces
keep motion clean, cinematic, and premium
project.audio_notes: Minimal low synth pulse, restrained cinematic whooshes, subtle impacts, and airy ambience under external narration only.

shots.title: The old advantage disappears
shots.subject: a lone high-performing engineer in a dark futuristic design studio
shots.action: studies complex floating systems alone as the room subtly dims and the feeling of certainty starts collapsing
shots.setting: dark graphite design studio with abstract architecture, suspended geometric design forms, and premium atmospheric depth
shots.lighting: cool rim light with faint electric amber accents and controlled contrast
shots.camera_motion: slow push-in with a slight downward tilt as the room feels smaller
shots.start_frame: one brilliant engineer stands alone in a large premium studio, surrounded by abstract technical forms that imply intelligence and mastery
shots.end_frame: the room closes in visually and the engineer suddenly feels isolated and vulnerable
shots.narration_line: The smartest engineer in the room may no longer win.
shots.narration_cue: land the final word as the room visually tightens around the subject
shots.sfx_notes: low cinematic hum, faint tonal drop, subtle whoosh as the frame tightens

shots.title: The average engineer gets leverage
shots.subject: two generic engineers, one alone and one amplified by multiple AI copilots
shots.action: the AI-augmented engineer rapidly multiplies outputs and overtakes the lone expert in a clean symbolic race
shots.setting: sleek abstract competition space with layered workstations, progress shapes, and premium motion-graphics depth
shots.lighting: cool white on the lone side, brighter amber-white energetic glow on the AI-assisted side
shots.camera_motion: start centered, then drift toward the AI-assisted side as it surges ahead
shots.start_frame: two engineers begin at similar starting points in a polished abstract work arena
shots.end_frame: the AI-assisted engineer clearly surges ahead while the lone genius falls behind
shots.narration_line: A mediocre engineer with AI can now outperform a genius without it.
shots.narration_cue: hit outperform as the AI-assisted side pulls decisively ahead
shots.sfx_notes: tight rhythmic pulses, layered whooshes, subtle acceleration sound on the winning side
must_keep: clear visual contrast between solo work and AI leverage
strong central composition readable on mobile
negative_constraints: no clutter in the lower center

shots.title: One engineer becomes a command center
shots.subject: one generic engineer orchestrating a rapidly multiplying swarm of AI agents
shots.action: translucent AI assistants branch outward to handle design, code, testing, planning, and simulation tasks in parallel
shots.setting: vertical command chamber made of holographic layers, luminous nodes, and flowing task pathways without readable text
shots.lighting: electric amber and cool white volumetric light with premium depth
shots.camera_motion: slow orbit around the engineer as the swarm expands into a towering halo
shots.start_frame: one engineer stands in the center of a quiet futuristic control space
shots.end_frame: the engineer is surrounded by a massive elegant swarm of AI helpers filling the frame vertically
shots.narration_line: Jensen Huang says the next engineer will work with a hundred AI agents.
shots.narration_cue: land hundred AI agents at the fullest expansion of the swarm
shots.sfx_notes: layered synth bloom, branching holographic pings, smooth energy rise

shots.title: The warning goes public
shots.subject: a keynote silhouette on stage and distant offices reacting to the message
shots.action: a speaker's silhouette delivers a warning on a bright stage while the message ripples outward into generic engineering workspaces around the world
shots.setting: high-production conference stage dissolving into a global montage of premium offices and screens
shots.lighting: bright stage backlight transitioning into cool office lighting with urgent amber highlights
shots.camera_motion: push toward the stage silhouette, then flow outward through space into multiple reacting environments
shots.start_frame: a dramatic keynote silhouette stands before a bright abstract screen on a giant stage
shots.end_frame: engineers across multiple clean workspaces pause as the warning reaches them
shots.narration_line: In March twenty twenty-six, he argued that engineers who barely use AI are already at a disadvantage.
shots.narration_cue: land at a disadvantage as the offices visibly react
shots.sfx_notes: conference-scale reverb, pulse transition into multiple soft alert accents

shots.title: The token standard
shots.subject: a highly paid engineer represented by premium symbolic salary and AI-usage meters
shots.action: a compensation meter glows large while the AI usage stream stays too small, triggering a sharp visual alarm and imbalance
shots.setting: dark luxury data visualization chamber with elegant bars, flowing token particles, and no readable labels
shots.lighting: electric amber warning highlights against dark graphite and cool white accents
shots.camera_motion: slow descending move as the empty AI-usage stream becomes obvious and the warning intensifies
shots.start_frame: a towering compensation bar and a much smaller AI-usage stream sit in tense imbalance
shots.end_frame: the mismatch triggers a dramatic red-amber alarm effect around the engineer symbol
shots.narration_line: He said he'd be deeply alarmed if a five-hundred-thousand-dollar engineer wasn't using at least two-hundred-fifty-thousand dollars' worth of AI tokens.
shots.narration_cue: let deeply alarmed hit as the warning glow spreads through the frame
shots.sfx_notes: controlled warning pulse, deep impact, flowing particle hiss
must_keep: strong imbalance between salary and AI-use metaphors
negative_constraints: no readable numbers or labels inside the image

shots.title: Old tools versus new leverage
shots.subject: an engineer struggling with old manual tools contrasted against an AI-native control cockpit
shots.action: the manual method looks slow and fragile while the AI-native environment moves with effortless parallel speed
shots.setting: split world of sketch-paper fragments dissolving into a luminous AI command cockpit
shots.lighting: muted desaturated light on the manual side and clean luminous depth on the AI side
shots.camera_motion: travel from the weak manual side into the powerful AI cockpit in one seamless move
shots.start_frame: manual tools and paper-like fragments dominate the left side of a tense frame
shots.end_frame: the frame resolves into a premium AI-native command environment with overwhelming advantage
shots.narration_line: To him, working without AI is like designing modern chips with paper and pencil.
shots.narration_cue: land paper and pencil as the old tools visually dissolve
shots.sfx_notes: paper rustle dissolving into clean futuristic sweep and low synth bloom

shots.title: The new advantage
shots.subject: one engineer channeling massive streams of AI-generated work through a single command point
shots.action: countless design and execution streams flow through the engineer, turning one person into multiplied output
shots.setting: abstract vertical data-and-workflow chamber with glowing channels and premium depth
shots.lighting: clean white throughput lines with controlled amber energy highlights
shots.camera_motion: slow rise from the engineer's hands upward through the multiplied output streams
shots.start_frame: one engineer holds a calm central stance while only a few output lines are visible
shots.end_frame: the whole frame becomes a towering flow of multiplied work streaming through one person
shots.narration_line: The new advantage is not raw IQ. It's how much AI work flows through you.
shots.narration_cue: land flows through you at the peak of the multiplied stream
shots.sfx_notes: steady rising synth line, soft energetic current, elegant acceleration

shots.title: Who you are really competing against
shots.subject: a field of generic engineers in a symbolic race, with one AI-augmented engineer pulling ahead
shots.action: the AI-augmented engineer breaks away from the pack toward a bright finish line while the others fade slightly behind
shots.setting: clean futuristic sprint corridor with layered depth, luminous horizon, and premium motion design
shots.lighting: high-energy amber-white finish glow with cool shadowed background depth
shots.camera_motion: fast but smooth forward chase ending on the AI-augmented leader
shots.start_frame: multiple engineers run side by side in a sleek symbolic race corridor
shots.end_frame: one AI-augmented engineer clearly leads the field in a strong closing hero frame
shots.narration_line: Your real competitor is the engineer using AI better than you.
shots.narration_cue: land better than you on the final lead frame
shots.sfx_notes: rising chase pulse, final whoosh, restrained impact on the closing hero frame
negative_constraints: no readable text in the world
